chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1186 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.4739/2025 (Ex.A) 3. For hearing of main case 12-11-2025 Mr. Zulfiqar Ali Jatoi, Additional PG for the State >>>>>..<<<<< None present for the Petitioners nor any intimation received. This Petition was filed at the time when there was no provision in the Sindh Control of Narcotic Substances Act, 2024; however subsequent thereto same was amended and proviso in respect of bail has been inserted, therefore, this Constitutional Petition is disposed of along with listed application. The petition is at liberty to approach the trial Court for appropriate relief in accordance with the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI
